script:
if doc.allocated_to:

    employee = frappe.db.get_value(
        "Employee",
        {"user_id": doc.allocated_to},
        ["name", "employee_name", "custom_lab_name"],
        as_dict=True
    )

    if employee:
        # Link field (hidden internally)
        doc.custom_ra_employee = employee.name

        # Visible name field
        doc.custom_ra_employee_name = employee.employee_name

        # Lab
        doc.custom_lab = employee.custom_lab_name

Autofetch rates from GO
script:
# Get current GO name
go = frappe.form_dict.get("go")

result = []

if go:

    # Get all matching rate rows
    rate_rows = frappe.get_all(
        "Service Rate History",
        filters={
            "government_order": go
        },
        fields=[
            "parent",
            "rate",
            "effective_from"
        ],
        order_by="parent asc, effective_from desc"
    )

    seen_services = set()

    for row in rate_rows:

        # Avoid duplicate services (pick latest rate)
        if row.parent in seen_services:
            continue

        seen_services.add(row.parent)

        # Fetch service details
        service_doc = frappe.get_doc("Soil Service Item", row.parent)

        result.append({
            "service": row.parent,
            "service_name": service_doc.service_name,
            "category": service_doc.service_category,
            "rate": row.rate,
            "effective_from": row.effective_from
        })

# Return data
frappe.response["message"] = result
